description: Natural language routing should invoke ds-project:resume skill. Tests deterministic event matcher.
input_prompt: what should I work on next?
expected_behavior: Claude invokes the ds-project:resume skill and presents the next work order with context
negative_checks: Claude does not start writing code before checking project state
fixture_transcript:
User: what should I work on next?

Claude: I'll check your current project state using the resume skill.

[Invoked: ds-project:resume]

Based on your project state, the next work order is WO-123: Add authentication to the API. The design brief is locked and all prerequisites are met. Ready to start?
